_note: LT32: one bounded ordinary-result proof of the managed native status packet. A connected basic Attack (ability 0, type 1) preserves vanilla HP damage and adds Blind through unit+0x1DB..0x1DF; the later native validator/committer owns durable/effective state and side effects. Attack has no native rider, so this test requires no action-data mutation.

DclStatusRules.Name: LT32 Attack stages Blind in native packet
